data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (validated 2026-06-09): validated guard is in the fsck tool body:
    if recover and _readonly():
        raise ValueError("fsck recover=True is a write operation and is disabled: this server is read-only (REBAR_MCP_READONLY)")
Validated together with the case-insensitive _readonly() fix on bug ship-mogul-glob (28d8) — land them together; engine confirmed never invoked under any truthy READONLY spelling. test_mcp.py + test_surface.py: 11 passed with both patches.
